description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa with a mid-century modern design, featuring a warm, light tan upholstery. The sofa has a gently curved backrest with subtle button tufting and rounded armrests that flare outward, creating a welcoming silhouette. Two individual seat cushions rest on the base, appearing plush and slightly raised from the frame. The sofa stands on four short, tapered wooden legs, which are positioned at each corner and finished in a natural wood tone. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching beyond the tufted backrest. Its overall proportions and inviting form make it suitable for urban parks, waiting areas, or sidewalk seating.
description: A compact, light tan two-seater sofa with curved backrest, flared armrests, and tapered wooden legs. Features smooth upholstery and subtle button tufting on the back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sofa's two seat cushions, button-tufted backrest, and flared armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sofa's curved profile and the outward flare of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, smooth backrest and the four wooden legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest's curve and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two loose, uniform seat cushions placed side by side; backrest features a single, continuous cushion with subtle button tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, medium height, outwardly flared with rounded profile; fully upholstered and smoothly integrated into the sofa's frame.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, tapered wooden legs positioned at each corner; legs are exposed, cylindrical, and finished in a natural wood tone.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with a gentle curve and subtle button tufting; smoothly transitions into the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color, smooth fabric upholstery with no visible patterns; subtle button tufting on the backrest adds minimal texture.
